name: Fidelity Investments
ai_strategy_summary: Fidelity is applying AI across both its direct-to-retail platform and its advisor-facing tools, with Trader+ (launched Sep 2025) as the flagship AI-powered active trading platform. With $16.4 trillion in AUA and 40+ million individual investor accounts, Fidelity's AI deployment operates at a scale that most wealth managers cannot match.
headline_initiative: Trader+ — AI-powered active trading platform launched September 2025

investment_portfolio.headline: Trader+ platform brings institutional-grade AI-powered trading tools to retail investors
investment_portfolio.detail: Fidelity Trader+ launched September 25, 2025 as a dedicated active trading platform with advanced AI-driven charting, options analytics, and real-time market intelligence. The platform extends Fidelity's existing robo-advisory capability (Fidelity Go) into active trading, covering the full spectrum from passive automated investing to AI-assisted active management.
evidence: Fidelity Go robo-advisor: existing automated portfolio management product
$16.4T AUA across retail and institutional (Fidelity Investments, 2025)
investment_portfolio.jpm_implication: Fidelity's scale means AI tools deployed across their platform instantly affect 40M+ accounts. The expectation gap between Fidelity's AI-powered self-directed experience and JPM's Self-Directed offering will only widen.

research_content.headline: AI-powered market research, screeners, and investment insights built into Fidelity's retail platform
research_content.detail: Fidelity's retail brokerage platform integrates AI-driven research tools including stock screeners, earnings analysis, and personalized market commentary. The platform surfaces AI-generated insights alongside traditional analyst research, giving retail investors access to institutional-grade content at zero incremental cost.
evidence: AI-powered screeners and research tools embedded in Fidelity.com
Fidelity Go and Trader+ both include AI-assisted investment insights
Zero-cost access to AI research for all account holders
research_content.jpm_implication: Fidelity is training the next generation of wealth clients to expect AI-quality research as a baseline, included in any platform they use — not as a premium add-on.

advisor_productivity.headline: Fidelity Institutional AI tools supporting 13,000+ RIA and broker-dealer firms
advisor_productivity.detail: Fidelity Institutional provides AI-powered tools to the 13,000+ RIA and broker-dealer firms that custody assets with Fidelity. These include AI-assisted portfolio analytics, client reporting automation, and practice management tools — extending Fidelity's AI capabilities into the independent advisor channel at scale.
evidence: Fidelity Institutional: 13,000+ RIA and BD custodial relationships
AI tools available to advisors via Fidelity Institutional platform
Fidelity's institutional AI roadmap includes advisor workflow automation
advisor_productivity.jpm_implication: Fidelity is building AI capabilities into the custodial infrastructure that 13,000+ advisors depend on — creating a switching cost that competitors including JPMorgan's advisor platform must match.
